mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_user_relation (roomid, uid, uname, logo) VALUES (#{roomid}, #{mateDto.uid}, #{mateDto.uname}, #{mateDto.logo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM room_user_relation WHERE roomid = #{roomid} AND uid = #{uid}
mapper.insert: insert into roommate (roomid, memberid, membername) VALUES (#{roomid}, #{userid}, #{membername})
